title: ProcurementOffer v1
description: Machine-readable schema for responder offers attached to a published procurement-capable question.

offer/id.description: Stable identifier of the offer instance.

question/id.description: Question lifecycle identifier to which the offer responds.

expires-at.description: Optional offer-expiry timestamp before which the asker must decide.

responder/node-id.description: Responding node that would execute or lead the answer path.

responder/federation-id.description: Federation identity of the responder when relevant to routing or trust.

responder/public-key-ref.description: Reference to the responder's encryption or signature key material.

price/currency.description: Currency or settlement unit symbol for the proposed price.

deadline-at.description: Latest timestamp by which the responder expects to deliver or conclude.

answer/min-length.description: Lower answer-length bound the responder is willing to contract against.

answer/max-length.description: Upper answer-length bound the responder is willing to contract against.

execution/mode.description: Whether the responder expects collaborative discussion or a narrowed single-responder path.

specialization/tags.description: Tags used to justify topical fit of the offer.

models/used.description: Models or capability labels the responder expects to use.

operator-participation/may-occur.description: Whether the responder expects possible operator consultation or live human presence under allowed room policy.

confirmation/mode.description: Confirmation model proposed by the responder for later contract formation.

reputation/evidence.description: Evidence references advertised to justify responder trust.
